DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM. THOSE WHO HAVE NOT MADE AN APPEARANCE ARE DEEMED TO HAVE STIPULATED TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: NO OPPOSITION FILED; THE MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE CLAIM OF TAMMY HURLEY IS STRUCK. PETITIONER MAY WITHDRAW THE PETITION FOR FORFEITURE AND PROCEED WITH NON-JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Rebecca Wagner In Support Thereof [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM.

Appearances: Rebecca D. Wagner of the Office of the District Attorney (415.553.4997) for petitioner and moving party; No other appearances.

Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. Discussed and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: No opposition filed; the motion for terminating sanctions is granted. The claim of Tammy Hurley is struck. Petitioner may withdraw the Petition for forfeiture and proceed with non-judicial forfeiture proceedings. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Assistant District Attorney, Rebecca D. Wagner of the Office of the San Francisco District Attorney (415-553-4997) appears as counsel for the Petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is GRANTED with the exception that claimant need not produce her tax returns. The DA's office is to serve notice of this ruling on claimant. Responses to be served by 12/12/16. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Judge Pro Tem: David R. McDonald; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Continued To Nov-18-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
